name: proc_creation_win_csc_susp_dynamic_compilation
raw_query: any where process.executable:"*\\csc.exe" and ((process.command_line like~ ("*:\\Perflogs\\*", "*:\\Users\\Public\\*", "*\\AppData\\Local\\Temp\\*", "*\\Temporary Internet*", "*\\Windows\\Temp\\*")) or ((process.command_line:"*:\\Users\\*" and process.command_line:"*\\Favorites\\*") or (process.command_line:"*:\\Users\\*" and process.command_line:"*\\Favourites\\*") or (process.command_line:"*:\\Users\\*" and process.command_line:"*\\Contacts\\*") or (process.command_line:"*:\\Users\\*" and process.command_line:"*\\Pictures\\*")) or process.command_line:"SigmaRegularExpression(regexp=SigmaString(['([Pp]rogram[Dd]ata|%([Ll]ocal)', <SpecialChars.WILDCARD_SINGLE: 2>, '[Aa]pp[Dd]ata%|\\\\[Aa]pp[Dd]ata\\\\([Ll]ocal([Ll]ow)', <SpecialChars.WILDCARD_SINGLE: 2>, '|[Rr]oaming))\\\\[^\\\\]{1,256}$']), flags=set())") and (not ((process.parent.executable like~ ("C:\\Program Files (x86)\\*", "C:\\Program Files\\*")) or process.parent.executable:"C:\\Windows\\System32\\sdiagnhost.exe" or process.parent.executable:"C:\\Windows\\System32\\inetsrv\\w3wp.exe")) and (not ((process.parent.executable like~ ("C:\\ProgramData\\chocolatey\\choco.exe", "C:\\ProgramData\\chocolatey\\tools\\shimgen.exe")) or process.parent.command_line:"*\\ProgramData\\Microsoft\\Windows Defender Advanced Threat Protection*" or (process.parent.command_line like~ ("*JwB7ACIAZgBhAGkAbABlAGQAIgA6AHQAcgB1AGUALAAiAG0AcwBnACIAOgAiAEEAbgBzAGkAYgBsAGUAIAByAGUAcQB1AGkAcgBlAHMAIABQAG8AdwBlAHIAUwBoAGUAbABsACAAdgAzAC4AMAAgAG8AcgAgAG4AZQB3AGUAcgAiAH0AJw*", "*cAewAiAGYAYQBpAGwAZQBkACIAOgB0AHIAdQBlACwAIgBtAHMAZwAiADoAIgBBAG4AcwBpAGIAbABlACAAcgBlAHEAdQBpAHIAZQBzACAAUABvAHcAZQByAFMAaABlAGwAbAAgAHYAMwAuADAAIABvAHIAIABuAGUAdwBlAHIAIgB9ACcA*", "*nAHsAIgBmAGEAaQBsAGUAZAAiADoAdAByAHUAZQAsACIAbQBzAGcAIgA6ACIAQQBuAHMAaQBiAGwAZQAgAHIAZQBxAHUAaQByAGUAcwAgAFAAbwB3AGUAcgBTAGgAZQBsAGwAIAB2ADMALgAwACAAbwByACAAbgBlAHcAZQByACIAfQAnA*"))))
